description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the tmaier/docker-compose:latest Docker image with a docker:dind service and sets the DOCKER_TLS_CERTDIR variable. Define a single build stage and eight jobs named alpine-3.17-musl, alpine-3.18-musl, debian-bookworm-full, debian-bookworm-mini, fedora-38-clang, fedora-39-clang, ubuntu-lunar-dist, and ubuntu-mantic-dist, each running in the build stage. Each job runs a before_script that logs into the GitLab Container Registry using echo "$CI_REGISTRY_PASSWORD" | docker login --username "$CI_REGISTRY_USER" --password-stdin "$CI_REGISTRY" and installs make via apk add --no-cache make. The script for each job executes make bootstrap, then make $CI_JOB_NAME, and finally docker-compose push $CI_JOB_NAME. No caches, artifacts, or conditional rules are defined, so the jobs run on every pipeline.
